modules.name: Nymphs World
modules.summary: Private development build of the Nymphs World page-first worldbuilding vault.

modules.name: Nymphs Sprite
modules.summary: Dev-mode guided 8/16-direction game sprite generation with local Pose Lab refs, review, lifecycle, and export.

modules.name: LoRA
modules.summary: Dev-mode AI Toolkit powered Z-Image Turbo LoRA training sidecar for datasets, jobs, and generated adapters.

modules.name: TripoSplat
modules.summary: Dev-mode TripoSplat module for single-image Gaussian splat generation and .ply / .splat preview.

modules.name: WORBI
modules.summary: Dev-mode local-first worldbuilding workspace for lore, characters, locations, timelines, notes, and project planning.

overview.body: WORBI is a browser-based worldbuilding tool packaged as a Nymph module. It is designed for writers, game developers, solo creators, and teams who need a local project bible for fictional worlds and production notes. WORBI 6.3.24 provisions its local Node.js runtime during Install/Update and starts from that installed runtime path, so Start does not need a user-managed node command on PATH.
works_with: Blender/Unity/Unreal projects as external reference material
requirements: Local WebView2 or browser access to the WORBI web app
